name: Write Academic Article
description: Full article pipeline: subject selection -> source selection -> deep read -> thesis -> outline -> parallel section writing -> synthesis -> DOCX output.

nodes.prompt: Load .academic-helper/profile.md. Verify styleFingerprint exists. Output profile data for downstream nodes.
Ask the researcher what subject they want to write about. Confirm the target language matches their profile or ask if they want to override.
Present available sources from profile and Candlekeep (if enabled). Let the researcher select which sources to use for this article. Enrich source metadata via ck items get if available.

Spawn deep-reader agent. Read each selected source via Candlekeep. Ingest into Agentic-Search-Vectorless if enabled. Run 3 parallel queries per source: subject exploration, arguments, counterarguments. Map available evidence, key authors, tensions, and gaps.
Spawn architect agent (Mode A). Propose 2-3 thesis options with rationale, key supporting sources, and risk assessment. ALL output in targetLanguage.
Present thesis options to the researcher. They choose one (possibly with modifications). Store the approved thesis statement.

Spawn architect agent (Mode B). Generate article outline with section titles, argument roles, suggested sources, word counts, and paragraph counts. Introduction must open with 'במאמר זה', conclusion with 'לסיכום'.
Present the outline to the researcher. They may reorder sections, adjust word counts, add/remove sections, or refine argument roles.
If both Candlekeep and Agentic-Search-Vectorless are enabled: ensure all selected sources are ingested into vectorless. Run ck items read + vectorless ingest for any missing sources.

Spawn one section-writer agent PER SECTION (all in parallel). Each section-writer applies the 8-skill pipeline per paragraph: (1) Draft with mandatory vectorless search, (2) Style fingerprint compliance, (3) Hebrew grammar check, (4) Academic language & linking words, (5) Language purity, (6) Anti-AI check (score 5 dimensions, threshold 35/50), (7) Repetition check, (8) Citation audit via auditor subagent. Pass full styleFingerprint, linkingWords, thesis, and priorSectionTexts.

Spawn synthesizer agent. Two-phase review: (A) Argument coherence, logical flow, transitions, intro/conclusion structure, full-article style fingerprint compliance, language purity sweep. (B) Cross-section repetition check for arguments, phrases, openings, transitions, and evidence. Make targeted surgical fixes only — do NOT rewrite. Citations are LOCKED.

Generate structured abstract (תקציר): (1) topic & research question, (2) methodology & sources, (3) main findings & contribution. 150-300 words. If profile.abstractLanguages includes multiple languages, generate one abstract per language.

Score article on 6 dimensions (1-10 each): structure, argument logic, citation completeness, source coverage, writing quality, academic conventions. Present scorecard. If score < 40/60, ask researcher whether to proceed or address issues.

Generate .docx file with abstract section, researcher's format preferences: font (default David), 11pt body, 1.5 line spacing, justified alignment, 1" margins, page numbers, RTL layout. Save to project directory.
